message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Acos primitive

Adds 23 tests for arc cosine covering domain boundaries (-1 to 1),
common angles (π/3, π/4, π/6), out-of-domain (NaN), infinity, range
verification [0,π], monotonicity, symmetry, and cos/asin relationships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
